evidence: "Highway to Heaven Series is terrific family entertainment, always has a message to show how to treat others, we love them all."
"Great family viewing, we enjoyed them all in the set."
"It always had a nice little story & a show the whole family can watch together, so refreshing."
"Another nice feel movie, even my Husband loved it..."
"Enjoying the series, nice for a change of pace, a bit soapy at times though."
"This is an excellent series for the whole family, we have previously watched it on TV, but we are enjoying it again..."
"It is well shot & you get to see the horse working in many different roles..."
"My husband is a fan of Walker Texas Ranger, he just loves the series..."
"Corbin Bernsen is a great actor & Corbin Bernsen also wrote & Directed Rust..."
"There is also beautiful scenery to joy, a added bonus."
"It shows where the horse first came from & the scenery is so beautiful."
"makes you think, great acting by all, enjoyable movie."
"This is an entertaining Movie, based on a true story which I love, it has everything humour as well as drama & family values."

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented films and series with simple narratives and a slower pace. They appreciate beautiful visuals and emotional depth, often valuing the overall experience over high production quality.
